sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46983" key="h(mero/dotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερό-δοτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46983.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestowed for a day</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">136</biblScope> </bibl> (but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἡρόδοτος</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
